name: PickList
description: PickList is used to reorder items between different lists.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: Value of the component as a multidimensional array.

props.name: selection
props.description: Selected items in the list as a multidimensional array.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Name of the field that uniquely identifies the a record in the data.

props.name: metaKeySelection
props.description: Defines whether metaKey is requred or not for the selection. When true metaKey needs to be pressed to select or unselect an item and when set to false selection of each item can be toggled individually. On touch enabled devices, metaKeySelection is turned off automatically.

props.name: autoOptionFocus
props.description: Whether to focus on the first visible or selected element.

props.name: focusOnHover
props.description: When enabled, the focus is placed on the hovered option.

props.name: listStyle
props.description: Inline style of the the list element.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Whether the list optimizes layout based on screen size.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary when responsiveness is enabled.

props.name: scrollHeight
props.description: Height of the viewport, a scrollbar is defined if height of list exceeds this value.

props.name: striped
props.description: Whether to displays rows with alternating colors.

props.name: showSourceControls
props.description: Whether to show buttons of source list.

props.name: showTargetControls
props.description: Whether to show buttons of target list.

props.name: buttonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move up button inside the component.

props.name: moveUpButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move up button inside the component.

props.name: moveTopButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move top button inside the component.

props.name: moveDownButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move down button inside the component.

props.name: moveBottomButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move bottom button inside the component.

props.name: moveToTargetProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move to target button inside the component.

props.name: moveAllToTargetProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move all to target button inside the component.

props.name: moveToSourceProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move to source button inside the component.

props.name: moveAllToSourceProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the ButtonProps to the move all to source button inside the component.

props.name: tabindex
props.description: Index of the list element in tabbing order.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: reorder
events.description: Callback to invoke when the list is reordered.

events.name: selection-change
events.description: Callback to invoke when one or more items are moved to the other list.

events.name: move-to-target
events.description: Callback to invoke when one or more items are moved to the target list.

events.name: move-all-to-target
events.description: Callback to invoke when all items are moved to the target list.

events.name: move-to-source
events.description: Callback to invoke when one or more items are moved to the source list.

events.name: move-all-to-source
events.description: Callback to invoke when all items are moved to the source list.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Item of the component */ item: any; /** * Selection state */ selected: boolean; /** * Index of the item. */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: option
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Option of the component */ option: any; /** * Selection state */ selected: boolean; /** * Index of the option. */ index: number; }): VNode[]

slots.name: movetotargeticon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether view change. */ viewChanged: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom move to target icon template.

slots.name: movealltotargeticon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether view change. */ viewChanged: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom move all to target icon template.

slots.name: movetosourceicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether view change. */ viewChanged: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom move to source icon template.

slots.name: movealltosourceicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether view change. */ viewChanged: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom move all to source icon template.
